leadText: The Moon Flute (Japanese: つきのふえ Moon Flute) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When the Sun Flute and Moon Flute are played in harmony at the Altar of the Sunne during the storyline of Pokémon Sun and Ultra Sun, it causes Nebby to evolve into Solgaleo . When the Sun Flute and Moon Flute are played in harmony at the Altar of the Moone during the storyline of Pokémon Moon and Ultra Moon, it causes Nebby to evolve into Lunala .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method M UM Exeggutor Island

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V It is said that the tones it produces were offered up as an expression of gratitude to the Legendary Pokémon of the moon.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Sun and Ultra Sun, this item is in Lusamine 's possession. After the player defeats Lusamine, Gladion finds it among Lusamine's belongings and gives it to Lillie . In Pokémon Moon and Ultra Moon, this item is located on Exeggutor Island . The player obtains it as an item in their Bag upon finding it. When the Sun Flute and Moon Flute are played in harmony at the Altar of the Moone during the storyline of Pokémon Moon and Ultra Moon, it causes Nebby to evolve into Lunala .
